title: Bandhan Aur Bagawat
desc: Bandhan Aur Bagawat

title: Tere Liye
desc: Taani learns of Anurag's location and goes to the mental asylum to meet him; while she recalls her first meeting with him, Anurag's father, Shekhar, has a plan brewing.

title: Sacchi Dosti
desc: Cheng Zhen, a real estate agent, and her colleague Shao Peng, who conceals his true identity, face challenges as they work with different families, gaining insights into love and life along the way.

title: Love Ke Liye
desc: After tribulations,Jiang Sheng finally realizes the true meaning of life and love, and decides to pursue her true heart.

title: Bandhan Aur Bagawat

title: Tere Liye
desc: Ananya decides to get married to Ritesh when she suspects that Shekhar is planning her marriage elsewhere; she learns that it is Taani and Anurag who are to wed.
